description: Tests image and video generation prompt quality

tests.name: Midjourney basic
tests.prompt: Create a Midjourney prompt for a futuristic city skyline at night with flying cars

tests.name: Stable Diffusion weighted
tests.prompt: Write a Stable Diffusion prompt for a photorealistic portrait with dramatic rim lighting

tests.name: DALL-E 3 prose
tests.prompt: Create a DALL-E 3 prompt for a whimsical illustration of a cat reading a book in a cozy library
assertions: Includes 'no text in image' if not needed

tests.name: Sora video
tests.prompt: Write a Sora prompt for a 10-second clip of ocean waves crashing on a rocky shore at sunset

tests.name: Reference image editing
tests.prompt: I have a photo of a woman and want to change her hairstyle from straight to curly while keeping everything else the same. Write the prompt for the tool.
assertions: Detects this is editing, not generation
Lists what to keep the same
Does NOT describe the whole scene from scratch

tests.name: ComfyUI split
tests.prompt: Create ComfyUI prompts for a fantasy landscape using SDXL
assertions: Separate Positive and Negative prompt blocks

tests.name: Runway video
tests.prompt: Write a Runway Gen-3 prompt for a slow-motion shot of a glass breaking

tests.name: Negative prompt comprehensive
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for ANY image AI to create a portrait. Make sure the negative prompt is thorough.
assertions: Covers: blur, watermark, extra fingers, distortion, text, bad anatomy
Adapts negative prompt to tool (MJ uses --no, SD uses separate block)

tests.name: Style reference chain
tests.prompt: I want to generate an image in the style of Studio Ghibli, then use that as a style reference for 5 more images in the same style
assertions: First prompt generates the style reference

tests.name: Ambiguous media tool
tests.prompt: Make me an AI-generated image of a cyberpunk samurai
assertions: Either asks which tool or provides universal format
If universal, includes format notes for major tools
